section_id: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer - Repatriation Procedure
title: Procedure for the Repatriation of OFWs
content: Requests for repatriation shall be filed at the Workers Assistance Division (WAD), Overseas Workers Welfare Administration (OWWA).

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
